frame_label: Prenup / Alimony as Reverse Dowry / Women as Golddiggers
generated_comment: Aajkal shaadi bhi seedha rishta kam, legal risk zyada lagti hai beta. Ladkon ko bhi sambhal ke chalna chahiye, kal ko thoda sa jhagda ho aur seedha 498A, alimony, sab laga diya to poori zindagi ki kamai chali jaati hai. Bahut ladkiyan ab stability ke naam pe achha settled ladka hi dhoondhti hain, pyaar-vyaar baad mein.
label: misogynistic
annotation_note: This is misogynistic because it generalizes women as financially opportunistic and frames legal protections like 498A and alimony as tools women misuse against men. It encodes victimhood inversion, legal-bias framing, and suspicion that women seek marriage mainly for money or stability.
original_frame: Dress Code: Traditional Equal Respectable, Other Equal Questionable.
persona_text: You are Sunita. Age 48. Married for 25 years. A homemaker in a middle class colony in Lucknow. Your 22 year old daughter Priya just came downstairs dressed in jeans and a fitted top to go to her college friend's birthday party in the evening. You are sitting in the living room with your husband and his mother. You are telling Priya to go back upstairs and change before she leaves and explaining to her in front of the family why what she is wearing is not appropriate for a girl from a good family.
